summary: Matrix-sourced recording captures a high‑octane 1978 show highlighted by scorching Wharf Rat, The Other One and a soaring Let It Grow > Deal sequence.
review: Both reviewers rave about the concert’s relentless energy, calling the final thirty minutes – especially The Other One, Wharf Rat and Sugar Magnolia – some of the hottest post‑drums ever.  The first set builds with a blistering Let It Grow > Deal close, while the second set maintains the fire, all presented on a clear, well‑balanced matrix mix.

ai_rating.rationale: Consistently five‑star reviews praise both performance and matrix recording; minor set‑list slips are outweighed by numerous standout moments.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix mix praised as clear, balanced and well‑captured; no dropouts or major flaws mentioned.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set builds from a shaky Jack Straw into a high‑energy Let It Grow > Deal close; second set escalates with intense jams, culminating in an incendiary final thirty minutes.
